en: Or do you not know, brothers- for I am speaking to those who know the law- that the law is binding on a person only as long as he lives?
zh: 弟兄們，我對懂得律法的人說，你們不曉得律法管轄人，是在他活著的期間嗎？

en: Thus a married woman is bound by law to her husband while he lives, but if her husband dies she is released from the law of marriage.
zh: 一個已婚的婦人，在丈夫活著的時候，她是受律法約束歸屬丈夫；丈夫若死了，她就脫離丈夫在律法上的約束。

en: Accordingly, she will be called an adulteress if she lives with another man while her husband is alive. But if her husband dies, she is free from that law, and if she marries another man she is not an adulteress.
zh: 所以，當丈夫還活著的時候，如果她歸屬別的男人，就稱為淫婦；丈夫若死了，她就脫離了律法的約束，如果她歸屬別的男人，也不是淫婦。

en: Likewise, my brothers, you also have died to the law through the body of Christ, so that you may belong to another, to him who has been raised from the dead, in order that we may bear fruit for God.
zh: 這樣，我的弟兄們，你們藉著基督的身體，對律法來說也已經死了，使你們歸屬另一位，就是那從死人中復活的，為的是要我們結果子給 神。

en: For while we were living in the flesh, our sinful passions, aroused by the law, were at work in our members to bear fruit for death.
zh: 我們從前屬肉體的時候，罪惡的情慾藉著律法在我們的肢體裡發動，就結出死亡的果子。

en: But now we are released from the law, having died to that which held us captive, so that we serve not under the old written code but in the new life of the Spirit.
zh: 但現在，我們既然向那捆綁我們的律法死了，就脫離了律法的約束，好讓我們用心靈的新樣子，而不用儀文的舊方式來服事主。

en: What then shall we say? That the law is sin? By no means! Yet if it had not been for the law, I would not have known sin. I would not have known what it is to covet if the law had not said, "You shall not covet."
zh: 這樣，我們可以說甚麼呢？難道律法是罪嗎？絕對不是。不過，如果不是藉著律法，我就不知道甚麼是罪；如果不是律法說“不可貪心”，我就不知道甚麼是貪心。

en: But sin, seizing an opportunity through the commandment, produced in me all kinds of covetousness. Apart from the law, sin lies dead.
zh: 但罪趁著機會，藉著誡命在我裡面發動各樣的貪心，因為沒有律法，罪是死的。

en: I was once alive apart from the law, but when the commandment came, sin came alive and I died.
zh: 在沒有律法的時候，我是活的；但誡命一來，罪就活了，我就死了。

en: The very commandment that promised life proved to be death to me.
zh: 那本來使人活的誡命，反而使我死了；

en: For sin, seizing an opportunity through the commandment, deceived me and through it killed me.
zh: 因為罪藉著誡命把握著機會來欺騙我，並且殺了我。

en: So the law is holy, and the commandment is holy and righteous and good.
zh: 這樣，律法是聖潔的，誡命也是聖潔、公義和良善的。

en: Did that which is good, then, bring death to me? By no means! It was sin, producing death in me through what is good, in order that sin might be shown to be sin, and through the commandment might become sinful beyond measure.
zh: 既是這樣，那良善的反而使我死嗎？絕對不是！但罪藉著那良善的使我死，就顯出真是罪，為了要使罪藉著誡命變成更加邪惡。

en: For we know that the law is spiritual, but I am of the flesh, sold under sin.
zh: 我們知道律法是屬靈的，我卻是屬肉體的，已經賣給罪了。

en: I do not understand my own actions. For I do not do what I want, but I do the very thing I hate.
zh: 因為我所作的，我不明白；我所願意的，我沒有去作，我所恨惡的，我倒去作。

en: Now if I do what I do not want, I agree with the law, that it is good.
zh: 如果我所不願意的，我倒去作，我就不得不承認律法是好的。

en: So now it is no longer I who do it, but sin that dwells within me.
zh: 既是這樣，那就不是我作的，而是住在我裡面的罪作的。

en: For I know that nothing good dwells in me, that is, in my flesh. For I have the desire to do what is right, but not the ability to carry it out.
zh: 我知道在我裡面，就是在我肉體之中，沒有良善，因為立志行善由得我，行出來卻由不得我。

en: For I do not do the good I want, but the evil I do not want is what I keep on doing.
zh: 所以我願意行的善，我沒有去行；我不願意作的惡，我倒去作了。

en: Now if I do what I do not want, it is no longer I who do it, but sin that dwells within me.
zh: 我若作自己不願意作的事，那就不是我作的，而是住在我裡面的罪作的。

en: So I find it to be a law that when I want to do right, evil lies close at hand.
zh: 因此，我發現了一個律，就是我想向善的時候，惡就在我裡面出現。

en: For I delight in the law of God, in my inner being,
zh: 按著我裡面的人來說，我是喜歡 神的律，

en: but I see in my members another law waging war against the law of my mind and making me captive to the law of sin that dwells in my members.
zh: 但我發覺肢體中另有一個律，和我心中的律爭戰，把我擄去附從肢體中的罪律。

en: Wretched man that I am! Who will deliver me from this body of death?
zh: 我這個人真是苦啊！誰能救我脫離這使我死亡的身體呢？

en: Thanks be to God through Jesus Christ our Lord! So then, I myself serve the law of God with my mind, but with my flesh I serve the law of sin.
zh: 感謝 神，藉著我們的主耶穌基督就能脫離了。可見，一方面我自己心裡服事 神的律，另一方面我的肉體卻服事罪的律。
